column1: # /Worksheet Global Default Other International Currency Prefix|Suffix
# — chooses where the currency symbol sits and prompts for the symbol.
# Widen column A so the suffix variants fit without overflowing
# to asterisks (default width 9 is not enough for "USD1234.50").
# /WGDOIC P — Prefix mode, prompt seeded with current symbol "$".
# Replace the seeded "$" with a 3-char prefix string.
# /WGDOIC S — Suffix mode with a different symbol.
